Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Monitors all tickers for pullback severity using 6 scientist-mode validated metrics: NATR-normalized drawdown, SMA structure (4 MAs), slope stage, volatility expansion ratio, beta-adjusted residual drawdown vs SPY, and historical recovery from similar past drawdowns. Composite health score 0-100 classifies pullbacks as Healthy, Caution, Warning, or Breakdown. Filter to owned stocks for portfolio monitoring.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Metric Guide

DD%Drawdown from 63-day high
DD NATRDrawdown severity normalized by ATR/price. <1.5 shallow, 1.5-3 normal, 3-5 deep, >5 severe
NATR%Normalized ATR (ATR/price). Higher = more volatile stock
SMAsPrice above 30/50/100/200-day SMA. =above =below. 4/4 = strong structure
StgSlope stage (S0=decline, S1=basing, S2=uptrend, S3=parabolic)
VolX10-day vol / 63-day vol. >1.5x = volatility expanding (instability)
Beta6-month beta vs SPY
ResidResidual DD = actual DD minus beta-expected DD. Positive = stock fell more than beta predicts (stock-specific weakness)
RecovMedian 21-day forward return from similar past drawdowns for this stock
HealthComposite score 0-100. NATR(25%) + SMA(25%) + Stage(20%) + VolX(10%) + Resid(10%) + Recov(10%)
https://briancarter456546.github.io/market-dashboards — Generated 2026-03-05 — For personal research only.
Sortino's Kitchen · Brian on Substack · Brian Carter Keynote Speaker
